holdings.infoBox: WEBS is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Dow Jones Internet Bear 3X ETF (WEBS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ Internet Composite index. The fund provides 3x daily inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of the largest and most liquid U.S. Internet companies. WEBS was launched on Nov 7, 2019 and is issued by Direxion.
